role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing in equity securities (e.g. common and preferred stock) and/or unaffiliated ETFs. It will generally invest in equity securities of U.S. large capitalization companies or other investments with similar economic characteristics. It is non-diversified.
